event_description: User taps the Get Started button on the onboarding screen, entering the sign-up funnel.
User successfully completes account creation via email verification code.
User completes an OAuth registration flow (Google, Facebook, or Apple) from the sign-up screen.
User successfully signs in via email verification code.
User completes an OAuth login flow (Google, Facebook, or Apple) from the sign-in screen.
User confirms their chosen learning language on the language selection screen.
User taps the Continue button on the home screen banner to continue their current lesson.
User taps a Today's Plan activity item on the home screen.
User earns XP points, indicating active learning engagement.
User completes a lesson, the primary outcome metric for the app.
